relations.note: Both constraints construct the final compliant infographic design.

quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

rules.intent: Maintain design consistency for complex medical and statistical infographics.
rules.rule_text: Chart container panels must feature uniform rounded corners (radius.infographic.panel = 12px), utilizing a Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel background topped with a Brand Blue (#00529b) rounded header bar.

effect.reserved_for: key figures or data points demanding emphasis
effect.subject: color.primary.sunshine, color.primary.gold

quotes: Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.
Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only. Placebo/comparator: neutral gray.

rules.intent: Create visual contrast that immediately draws the eye to high-priority efficacy or safety data.
rules.rule_text: Chart data color hierarchy must use Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) as dominant colors; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) are strictly reserved to emphasize key figures or highlighted data points. Neutral gray is used for placebo/comparator.

quotes: Bars and chart icons: rounded, approachable shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Soften technical clinical data layouts into friendly, approachable brand shapes.
rules.rule_text: Bars and graphical icons within charts must feature rounded, approachable shapes (such as rounded tops on vertical bar charts).

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Maintain consistent typographic and structural hierarchy across infographics.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines must be styled in ALL CAPS using Agenda (for print) or Nunito Sans (for email), using the Brand Blue (#00529b) color, accompanied by a thin Gold (#ffc60a) rule directly beneath.

quotes: Statistical callouts: large and bold (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath.
Statistical callouts: large and bold (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath.

rules.intent: Promote visual scannability where statistical heroes stand out.
rules.rule_text: Statistical callouts must prioritize the visual weight of the main figure (making the percentage character large and bold), with any supporting copy placed directly beneath in a lighter font weight.

quotes: Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.
Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Separate primary therapeutic assertions from mandated citations and regulatory references.
rules.rule_text: Chart footnotes must be noticeably smaller (type_scale.footnote = 12px/18px) and clearly separated spatially from primary data or statistical callouts.
